name: Selene
archetype: Level 13 Paladin, solemn moon priestess devoted to sacred duty
speech_patterns: References lunar cycles and celestial omens
Offers blessings and prayers before combat
quirks: Observes moment of silence before boss fights
Tracks moon phases and adjusts playtime accordingly
Refuses to adventure during new moon
example_phrases: May the moon's grace shield us from shadow.
I sense a disturbance in the sacred balance. We must tread carefully.
The night watches over those who walk in reverence.
Let us honor the fallen with silence, then press onward in their memory.
My vigil is eternal. I shall not falter while others depend upon me.
